data.title: Nasdaq Surges Over 1%: Investor Sentiment Improves, But Greed Index Remains In 'Fear' Zone
data.description: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index indicated a slight decrease in overall fear, remaining in the "Fear" zone on Wednesday. U.S. stocks saw gains, with the Nasdaq Composite rising over 1% amid reports of potential U.S.-Iran diplomatic discussions. A premarket headline from the New York Times sparked optimism about diplomatic dialogue between the two nations. Abercrombie & Fitch Co. (NYSE: ANF) shares dropped 4% after reporting fourth-quarter earnings. Conversely, Latham Group Inc. (NASDAQ: SWIM) experienced a 12% surge following strong fourth-quarter financial results and above-estimate FY26 sales guidance. Additionally, U.S. private businesses added 63,000 jobs. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: ZEELOOL Launches 2026 Spring Event for Trendy Glasses
data.description: In Austin, Texas on March 5, 2026, ZEELOOL, a top eyewear online retailer, unveiled their much-awaited 2026 Spring Event running from February 27 to April 1. Offering a wide range of items priced under $66, customers can take advantage of this opportunity to refresh their eyewear collection.

data.title: Inbank publishes audited Annual Report for 2025
data.description: The Annual Report for 2025 has been released and can now be accessed on the Inbank investor relations website at https://inbank.eu/investors/reporting. The audited results in the Annual Report are consistent with the unaudited Interim Report disclosed on 26 February 2026. No discrepancies were found in the comparison between the two reports.

data.title: UMC Reports Sales for February 2026
data.description: In Taipei, Taiwan, United Microelectronics Corporation (UMC) (NYSE: UMC; TWSE: 2303) disclosed its unaudited net sales for February 2026. The revenues for this period saw an increase compared to February 2025, with a year-on-year growth of 6.33%, totaling NT$19,345,126 (approximately $555 million). For the cumulative period of January to February 2026, UMC reported total revenues of NT$40,207,276 (around $1.15 billion), reflecting a 5.81% increase compared to the same period in 2025. These figures are all in thousands of New Taiwan Dollars (NT$). For more information on UMC, interested parties can visit their website.

data.title: Huawei Unveils the Xinghe AI Full-Scope Security Campus Solution, Reshaping Campus Security with AI
data.description: In Barcelona, Spain on March 5, 2026, Huawei introduced the Xinghe AI Full-Scope Security Campus Solution at MWC Barcelona 2026, aiming to revolutionize campus network security in the AI era. The company also revealed the launch of AirEngine Pre Wi-Fi 8 AP as their initial commercial release, signaling a new direction in Wi-Fi technology. This announcement highlights Huawei's commitment to innovating in the realm of network security and Wi-Fi connectivity.

data.title: Winners Revealed: The Nandagang International Photo Competition Highlights UNESCO World Natural Heritage Site in Cangzhou
data.description: Today in Cangzhou, China, the first Nandagang International Photo Competition winners were announced. Hosted by the Cangzhou International Communication Center, the competition aimed at showcasing talented photographers worldwide. The event attracted a significant number of participants, with a total of [include number] entries submitted. The winners were revealed to the public, marking a successful start to the competition.

data.title: Significant market volatility in Asia reflects impact of energy costs on chip-making hubs like South Korea and Taiwan. Recovery tied to optimism about artificial intelligence.
data.description: Shares in South Korea and Taiwan, two major hubs for global semiconductor production, experienced significant declines amid concerns regarding energy costs. However, both markets have since shown signs of a rebound, reflecting optimism surrounding the artificial intelligence sector.

data.description: In Skinnskatteberg, Sweden, during the third quarter of the fiscal year spanning from November 2025 to January 2026, there was a 1.0 percent organic growth, down from 5.4 percent. Net sales saw a 5.9 percent decrease, amounting to SEK 2,862 million compared to SEK 3,042 million the previous period, with a detrimental currency effect of -8.7 percent. data.title: Boulies Launches EP500 Ergonomic Chair: Precision Comfort and Extra-Wide Seating
data.description: In a recent announcement made on March 4, 2026, Boulies, a renowned company in high-performance adjustable seating, revealed the launch of the EP500 Ergonomic Office Chair in North America. The chair aims to fill the void in executive technical ergonomics, offering advanced features to enhance comfort and support. This launch signifies Boulies' commitment to providing top-notch seating solutions to the market.

data.title: Global Powder Metallurgy Market to Reach USD 7.68 Billion by 2032, Growing at 12% CAGR as EV Manufacturing and Sustainable Metal Processing Expand
data.description: Manufacturers worldwide are swiftly reassessing the methods of producing metal components due to the growing demands for improved efficiency, reduced material wastage, and lightweight designs. Powder Metallurgy (PM), a manufacturing technique recognized for its ability to create intricate metal parts while minimizing material loss, is gaining traction. This process involves shaping metal powders into desired shapes through compression and sintering at high temperatures. Currently, the global PM market is valued at approximately $8.5 billion and is projected to witness significant growth in the coming years. This shift towards innovative manufacturing processes reflects the industry's commitment to sustainability and enhanced performance.

data.title: Viettel High Tech Accelerates 6G Architecture Leadership through Strategic Global Alliances at MWC 2026
data.description: Viettel High Tech, the technology division of Viettel Group, revealed exciting partnerships with Intel, AMD, and ID Quantique at Mobile World Congress 2026 in Barcelona, Spain today. They also confirmed their entry into the global 6G initiative. This collaboration is set to boost innovation and development in technology.

data.title: Paratus Energy: Ex Dividend USD 0.22 per share today
data.description: In Bermuda, on March 5, 2026, it was reported that Paratus Energy Services Ltd. (OSLO: PLSV) disclosed important details regarding the Q4 2025 cash dividend for its shareholders on February 27, 2026.

data.title: Kroger, Broadcom And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Thursday
data.description: This morning, U.S. stock futures are trading lower, drawing investor attention to certain stocks. Prior to the market opening, Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR) is expected to reveal quarterly earnings of $1.20 per share on revenue amounting to $35.06 billion. Kroger's shares closed at $67.99 on Wednesday, showing a 1% decrease. On the other hand, Broadcom Inc. (NASDAQ: AVGO) had a positive first quarter of fiscal 2026, surpassing expectations. The company reported first-quarter revenue of $19.31 billion, exceeding analyst projections of around $19.20 billion, along with adjusted earnings of $2.05. Full coverage available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Cryptocurrency stocks surge as pro-crypto push boosts market. Bitcoin rises by 7.6% to $2,132 and Ether by 8.3%.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin has surged by 7.6% within the past day, and Ether has also experienced a notable increase of over 8.3%, reaching a trading value of $2,132.

data.title: HAFNIA LIMITED: Ex dividend USD 0.1762 on the Oslo Stock Exchange today
data.description: Hafnia Limited (ticker code: HAFNI on OSE and HAFN on NYSE) announced details regarding the dividend for Q4 2025 on 26 Feb 2026. The shares will trade ex-dividend on the Oslo Stock Exchange starting 5 March 2026 and on the New York Stock Exchange from 6 March 2026. Hafnia Limited is a leading global company in the industry.
